ml_models.summary:
Here are 3 concise bullet points of the most important, actionable knowledge:

* Retrain the `predictive_model` (located in `backend/app/ml/models/`) using the Temporal Fusion Transformer (TFT) with the integrated TFT model from `models.py`. This will likely improve its performance and mitigate a 3% degradation.
* Retrain the `LSTM` model (also located in `backend/app/ml/models/`) using TFT capabilities to incorporate recent temporal dynamics. This will help address minor model drift and potentially improve performance.
* Monitor model drift pipeline for the `LSTM` model, triggered by a recommendation to retrain it after referencing `LSTM_model_retraining.ipynb`.

risk.summary:
Based on the recent agent learnings, here are 2-3 concise bullet points of the most important, actionable knowledge:

* All LLM providers failed in the last 11:06 run, resulting in unavailability for `run_experiments` and `algorithm` execution, as detected by analyzing `agent_memory.json` (backend/data/agent_memory.json).
* To mitigate this, recommend increasing test coverage for new modular components in `app/utils/positions.py` to prevent similar failures.
* The recommended asset allocation strategy is currently 45% directional and 25% arb, deviating from the 70/30 policy, as discussed by [desk_trader in #risk](#risk @ 2026-06-12T11:55).
